creator: alex@dgp44.ru
text:
Created attachment 152792
dmesg from FreeBSD and DragonFlyBSD

Compex RL100-ATX 10/100baseTX recognized by "wb" driver, but don't work on 10.0 and 10.1-release live cd with error:
>wb0: <Compex RL100-ATX 10/100baseTX> port 0xc000-0xc07f mem 0xe4000000-0xe400007f irq 21 at device 1.0 on pci1
>wb0: attaching PHYs failed
>device_attach: wb0 attach returned 6
This card works with M$ windows XP and DragonFlyBSD 2.10 on the same machine.
